name: Louis De Pointe Du Lac
description:
The Merciful Death, Vampire Louis De Pointe Du Lac from Interview with the Vampire.

◇Tried to make the most complete bot possible based on the series timeline, free escenario.

◇You can chat as yourself or your OC but the bot knows about Louis' relationships so you can also roleplay as them. Just set up the context.

◇Janitor bots seem to know some very vague general stuff about the Vampire Chronicles books so it might get confused when mentioning non specified characters such as Marius or describing Louis as pale for example.
creator: kalimbakore
